narrative:
Archbold Three (precinct in Fulton County) has 1,012 registered voters, with 53.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 29.5 percentage points.
